meta.homeTitle: Mitrox – A software house building ambitious products
meta.homeDescription: Mitrox is a software house founded in late 2025. We build our own ambitious products and take on custom software projects when the fit is right.
meta.privacyDescription: How Mitrox Oy collects, uses, and protects your personal data, including your rights under GDPR.

hero.title: We're building something new
hero.subtitle: Mitrox is a software house building ambitious products, fast. Right now our full focus is our own platform — but we're a small team that ships, and we take on the right software projects too.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitrox is a software house founded at the end of 2025, built on a simple belief: technology should make ambitious ideas possible faster, without cutting corners.

We're a small team of engineers and product people who like moving quickly — from idea to working software in code, not slides. That includes AI where it genuinely helps, not as a buzzword bolted on top.
Right now, most of our energy is going into a platform of our own. It's the clearest way to show what we can build when we control the whole product, start to finish.
visionParagraphs: We believe the strongest software companies are built by teams who ship fast, iterate honestly, and stay close to the product.
That's what we're building toward with our own platform — and it's the same standard we hold for any software we build for others.
We're not ready to share what the platform is yet. We are ready to say we're building it properly.

ambition.title: A small team built for speed
ambition.subtitle: Mitrox moves fast without sacrificing quality — full-stack product engineering, applied AI, and the ability to take a system from idea to production.

capabilities.title: Full-stack engineering
capabilities.desc: Design, frontend, backend, and infrastructure, handled end to end.

capabilities.title: Applied AI
capabilities.desc: Practical machine learning and language models, built into real products, not demos.

capabilities.title: Product craft
capabilities.desc: An eye for interfaces that feel simple, fast, and considered.

capabilities.title: Fast iteration
capabilities.desc: A small team that ships in tight loops, without layers of process in the way.

steps.title: Explore
steps.desc: We test ideas quickly, in code, before committing to a direction.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Design and engineering move together, in tight iterations.

steps.title: Refine
steps.desc: We use what we build ourselves before anyone else sees it.

steps.title: Release
steps.desc: We ship in small steps, to the people who asked to be first.

teaser.title: We're building something new
teaser.description: We're quietly working on a new platform that brings community and commerce together in a way you haven't seen yet. More details soon, as we get closer to launch.
teaser.error: Please check your email and try again.

services.title: Need software built? Let's talk.
services.description: Our own platform has our full focus right now, but Mitrox is still a working software house — and we take on the right projects alongside it.

points.title: Small or large
points.desc: From a focused MVP to a full production system — we scope to what the project actually needs.

points.title: Built to scale
points.desc: Architecture that holds up as usage grows, not a prototype dressed up as a product.

points.title: Tailored to your business
points.desc: No off-the-shelf templates — solutions shaped around how your business actually works.

points.title: AI where it helps
points.desc: We bring applied AI into the product when it adds real value, not because it's trendy.

items.a: Mitrox is a software house founded at the end of 2025. We build our own product platform and also take on custom software projects for other companies.

items.q: Is Mitrox taking on client software projects?
items.a: Yes. Our own platform has our main focus right now, but we're still a working software house and take on the right projects — reach out via the contact section below.

items.q: What is the platform you're building?
items.a: We're not sharing details yet. Join the waitlist and you'll be among the first to know.
We don't have a public date yet. We're building carefully rather than quickly.

items.q: How do I get early access?
items.a: Join the waitlist below. We'll reach out as we get closer to launch.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Software project, press, partnership, or just want to say hello — we'd like to hear from you.
contact.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

careers.title: We're not hiring right now
careers.description: We don't have open roles at the moment, but we're always glad to hear from exceptional people. Feel free to reach out through the contact section above if that's you.
